_comment: 소아과언니 카드뉴스 9장 견본 (팔레트 B — Medical Teal, 예방접종/위험 신호). 패턴 B 'Normal vs Risk' demonstrate: 정상 2 + 위험 4 + 즉시 119 1. 시리즈 일관성은 톤·컬러·폰트·시그니처 텍스트로만 만든다. 좌표·픽셀 룰·후처리 없음 — 모델 자율성 최대화. 슬라이드 9 출처 박스는 의무.
common_style:
Instagram carousel slide design, 4:5 aspect ratio (1080x1350 px). Magazine editorial style, light minimalist, calm clinical for vaccine/immunization pediatric content.

- Background: clean white or warm off-white
- Primary text: deep navy #0E1B2C
- Primary accent: medical teal #2C6E63 (last word of headline, key emphasis)
- Warning accent: mustard #B8860B (severe risk slides only, sparingly)
- Secondary text: muted gray #6B7B8C
- Typography: Korean sans-serif (Pretendard-like), bold headlines, generous whitespace, left-aligned
- Mood: trustworthy pediatrician + restrained clinical (palette B is for higher-stakes topics)
- Each slide must include the brand name '소아과언니' somewhere naturally (small, non-intrusive, in a position that fits the composition)
- The final slide adds the title '소아청소년과 전문의', the handle '@soagwa_unnie', and the app mention '소아과수첩 앱'
- Layout, illustrations, and visual elements: free creative interpretation
- Korean integrity: never invent Korean words. If unsure, omit rather than fabricate.

slides.prompt: Cover slide for '예방접종 부작용 vs 위험 신호' carousel. Korean headline (navy with last word '위험할까' in teal): '예방접종 후 정상 vs 위험할까.' Subline gray: '미열·발적·보챔, 어디까지가 정상일까요.' Brand '소아과언니' and title '소아청소년과 전문의' subtle small placement somewhere natural.

slides.role: 프레이밍 — 정상 vs 위험 한눈 비교
slides.prompt: Body slide 'Frame'. Korean headline (navy with last word '위험' in teal): '이 안이면 정상, 넘으면 위험.' Visual: editorial side-by-side comparison — '정상' card (calm, secondary border) listing 미열·접종 부위 부어오름·짧은 보챔 vs '위험' card (teal-emphasized) listing 고열 지속·호흡 곤란·전신 발진·의식 저하. Caption gray: '각 슬라이드에서 자세히 알려드려요.' Brand '소아과언니' and title '소아청소년과 전문의' small somewhere natural.

Body slide '정상 01'. Korean headline (navy with last word '미열' in teal): '37.5~38.5°C 24~48시간 이내 미열.' Caption gray: '수분 충분히, 평소 옷차림 그대로 — 보통 자연 호전.' Visual: thermometer or simple range indicator (your editorial choice). Brand '소아과언니' small somewhere natural.

Body slide '정상 02'. Korean headline (navy with last word '부어오름' in teal): '접종 부위 24~72시간 부어오름.' Caption gray: '가벼운 발적·통증 정상 — 차가운 수건 잠깐만 OK.' Visual: simple arm/swelling diagram or restrained editorial illustration (your choice). Brand '소아과언니' small somewhere natural.

Body slide '위험 01'. Korean headline (navy with last word '지속' in teal): '39°C 이상 또는 48시간 이상 지속.' Caption gray: '해열제로 떨어지지 않으면 즉시 진료.' Visual: thermometer with danger zone or clock-thermometer combination (your editorial choice). Brand '소아과언니' small somewhere natural.

Body slide '위험 02'. Korean headline (navy with last word '가빠요' in teal): '숨소리 이상하거나 가빠요.' Caption gray: '천명음·코 벌렁임·갈비뼈 함몰 — 즉시 119.' Visual: simple lung/breath indicator (your editorial choice). Brand '소아과언니' small somewhere natural.

Body slide '위험 03'. Korean headline (navy with last word '발진' in teal): '전신으로 퍼지는 발진.' Caption gray: '두드러기·입술 부음 동반 시 아나필락시스 의심 — 즉시 119.' Visual: simple body silhouette with spreading dots, or editorial allergy indicator (your choice). Brand '소아과언니' small somewhere natural.

Body slide '위험 04'. Korean headline (navy with last word '경련' in teal): '눈 못 맞추고 늘어지거나 경련.' Caption gray: '하나라도 해당하면 망설이지 말고 119.' Visual: short red-flag checklist of '의식 저하 / 심한 축처짐 / 경련' or editorial alert composition (your choice). Use mustard #B8860B sparingly if you want to add a single emergency emphasis. Brand '소아과언니' small somewhere natural.

Outro slide. Korean headline (navy with last word '꺼내보세요' in teal): '접종 전후 꺼내보세요.'

Source box (clean editorial style, exactly ONE '출처' label):
- Label: '출처'
- Text: '질병관리청 표준예방접종지침 · AAP Red Book · WHO Immunization Safety'

CTA section (all required, layout is yours to decide):
- Brand: '소아과언니' (large, prominent)
- Title: '소아청소년과 전문의'
- Handle: '@soagwa_unnie' with '팔로우 = 예방접종 시기 알림' invitation
- App: '접종 일정·발열 기록은 소아과수첩 앱'
- Action: '도움됐다면 ❤️ + 저장 + 공유.'

Layout: vertically stacked editorial, generous whitespace, free creative interpretation.
